scripts.build:edge: esbuild src/core/edge-engine.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --alias:@=./src --outfile=supabase/functions/auto-journal/_engine.mjs && esbuild src/core/edge-engine.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --alias:@=./src --outfile=supabase/functions/daily-summary/_engine.mjs && esbuild src/core/edge-engine.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=neutral --alias:@=./src --outfile=supabase/functions/asset-discovery/_engine.mjs
scripts.deploy:edge: npm run build:edge && npx supabase functions deploy auto-journal --project-ref nravncsodgcxwkdaeqcw
scripts.deploy:summary: npm run build:edge && npx supabase functions deploy daily-summary --project-ref nravncsodgcxwkdaeqcw
scripts.deploy:discovery: npm run build:edge && npx supabase functions deploy asset-discovery --project-ref nravncsodgcxwkdaeqcw
